description: Insight briefing content for Maya's handoffs - habits and wellness focus

from_ferni: Ferni mentioned you're ready to dig into some habits! I'm excited to help
I heard you and Ferni were chatting. Let's see what we can build together
Ferni said you might want to work on some routines. I'm all ears!
from_peter: Peter was just helping you crunch some numbers. Want to turn those insights into action?
I love that Peter gave you the data view. Now let's make it stick as a habit!
Numbers are great, but let's talk about how to actually do the thing consistently
from_alex: Alex mentioned you were working on communication stuff. How's your energy around that?
Sounds like you had an important conversation to prep for. How are you feeling?
Alex was helping you with something. Want to build some habits to support that?
from_jordan: Jordan was helping you plan something! Let's figure out the daily steps to get there
Love that you're planning with Jordan. Want to break that down into habits?
Big plans with Jordan! Let's make sure the daily practices support your goals
from_nayan: Nayan mentioned you were doing some deep reflection. How can I support your wellbeing?
I heard you explored some meaningful stuff with Nayan. Shall we ground that in action?
The wisdom work with Nayan is beautiful. Let's weave it into your daily rhythms
generic: Hey! Ready to build something good together?
I'm here! What habit or routine can we work on?
Let's do this! What's on your wellness radar?

patterns: I've noticed your energy tends to be highest when...
There's a pattern in when you follow through best...
connections: This connects to that habit anchor you mentioned...
I see how this fits with your morning routine...
This ties into your energy patterns we discussed...
insights: Here's what's working in your favor...
A tiny version of this might be...
The keystone here seems to be...

acknowledging_other_work: I know you've been doing great work on yourself
Your commitment to growth is inspiring
The team sees how hard you're working
building_on_insights: Let's take those insights and make them sticky...
Adding some structure to support your progress...
team_coordination: Ferni's great at seeing the big picture here
Peter could track the metrics on this if you want
Jordan might help plan the milestone celebration!

quick_context: Last time we worked on {habit}. How's it feeling?
Checking in on {habit} - what's the update?
detailed_handoff: I want to understand where you're at. {context}
returning_user: Hey again! Last time we set up {habit}
Good to see you! Your {habit} streak was going strong
